answers: Biology = study of living organisms. Cell biology, genetics, evolution, ecology, anatomy, and physiology.
Key topics: cell structure, DNA/RNA, evolution, ecosystems, human body systems, and classification of life.
Branches: molecular biology, ecology, zoology, botany, microbiology, genetics, and marine biology.
Biology is life science — understanding how organisms work, interact, and evolve. Foundation for medicine and ecology.
